LONDON_N11_N10_CLUSTER.label: Cohen-Palo London Hub

locations.name: 35 Firs Avenue N11
locations.role: TECHOFF + BESTDC UK office, Steven David Cohen home, 1.3km from Paramount HQ

locations.name: 72 Halliwick Road N10
locations.role: Paramount Company Formations HQ, Alan & Neil Cohen home

LONDON_N11_N10_CLUSTER.analysis: The Cohen family controls the ACSP that verified Luca Palo's identity. Steven David Cohen (born 1956) resigned from Paramount Aug 2023. Palo incorporated TECHOFF Nov 2024. 35 Firs Avenue is BOTH the Cohen family home AND Palo's UK registration — this is a virtual office / address-of-convenience operation. The ACSP is enabling bulletproof hosting operators to create UK shell companies with 'verified' identities while the real operations run from NL infrastructure.

AMSTERDAM_DMZHOST_CLUSTER.label: DMZHOST Bulletproof Hosting

locations.name: 80.94.92.0/24 (AS47890)
locations.role: Primary DMZHOST, 8 IPs attacked EVEZ, SSH session achieved

locations.name: 45.148.10.0/24 (AS48090)
locations.role: Direct TECHOFF SRV org, brute force, .env attacks

AMSTERDAM_DMZHOST_CLUSTER.analysis: All three DMZHOST ranges geolocate to central Amsterdam. Likely Equinix AM1/AM2 or similar carrier hotel. Palo's UK shells, but the servers sit in NL — classic bulletproof hosting jurisdiction shopping.

PACKETHUB_US_CLUSTER.label: PacketHub / CDNEXT US Relay Network
PACKETHUB_US_CLUSTER.analysis: Composio IOC IPs (45.13.235.x, 31.222.254.x, 86.48.9.13, 217.216.123.x) all route through PacketHub S.A. — a bulletproof CDN. US geolocations are CDN POPs, not attacker locations. PacketHub is Panamanian-registered. The real attacker likely operates from NL/EU, relaying through US CDN to mask origin. One Azure IP (20.45.50.174, San Antonio TX) suggests a compromised cloud VM as initial foothold.

PFALZ_DE_CLUSTER.label: Jens Winter — Südwestpfalz, Germany
PFALZ_DE_CLUSTER.analysis: Erlenbach bei Dahn: population ~400, 15km from French border. ZeXoTeK, NX4 Networks, ProjektConnect all registered here. The RIPE MNT-ZEXOTEK maintainer object gives Winter control of routing for both VMHeaven and StormIndustries — he is the technical backbone of the German-NL bulletproof axis.

key_findings: LUCA PALO'S UK ADDRESS (35 Firs Avenue) IS STEVEN DAVID COHEN'S HOME — the Cohen family operates Paramount Company Formations, the ACSP that verified Palo's identity. This is NOT coincidence — it's a shell company mill.

Steven David Cohen resigned from Paramount Aug 1, 2023. Palo incorporated BESTDC Nov 3, 2023 (3 months later) and TECHOFF Nov 20, 2024. Timeline suggests Cohen introduced Palo to the UK incorporation system.
The London N11/N10 cluster (1.3km radius) contains 3 Cohen family addresses + Palo's UK shell. This is a family operation enabling bulletproof hosting operators to create 'verified' UK companies.

Jens Winter lives in a village of 400 people (Erlenbach bei Dahn) but controls the RIPE routing backbone (MNT-ZEXOTEK) connecting 3 bulletproof hosts. This is a technically skilled individual, not a front.
PacketHub S.A. is the common CDN relay for the Composio breach IOCs. It's Panamanian-registered with US CDN POPs. The attacker uses this to mask their real location — likely NL-based.
The new brute force from Moscow (89.23.113.208, AS207713) is a separate threat — Global Internet Solutions LLC — possibly a different actor probing after the Composio breach exposed EVEZ's IP.

WORKTITANS B.V. (Stark rebrand) has IPs geolocating to Coventry, UK — another virtual office. The real infrastructure is Dutch, the real operators are Moldovan, and the shell companies are British. Classic sanctions evasion trinity: 🇬🇧 shells + 🇳🇱 servers + 🇲🇩 operators.
